message:
test(proptest): add 50 property tests for beta_feedback_loop and fleet_memory_controller

- proptest_beta_feedback_loop.rs (22 tests): serde roundtrip for all 12
  serializable types (BetaStage, BetaCohort, QualitativeFeedback,
  SmoothnessObservation, BetaLoopConfig, PromotionDecision, DecisionReason,
  CohortEvaluation, StageEvaluation, BetaLoopSnapshot), stage ordering
  monotonicity, next/prev roundtrip, severity ordering, cohort activation
  monotonicity, controller snapshot roundtrip

- proptest_fleet_memory_controller.rs (28 tests): serde roundtrip for all
  6 serializable types (FleetPressureTier, FleetMemoryAction,
  FleetMemorySnapshot, FleetMemoryConfig, PressureSignals, DecisionRecord),
  tier ordering, action properties, mapping function order preservation,
  recommend_actions contract verification, controller integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
